Standings 2026

The latest standings show how quickly the division tightened once the midseason schedule shifted toward head-to-head matchups. Clubs that banked wins in April still hold an advantage, but the table is now dense enough that one strong week materially changes playoff odds and reshapes the race for the top seed.

American League standings
Team Wins Losses Pct
Lakeside 98 64 .605
River City 94 68 .580
Harbor 89 73 .549
Games 162

The shape of the race matters because the schedule remains unbalanced for another two weeks. That means clubs chasing the lead still control part of their fate, and the table remains a more useful artifact than a prose recap when readers want the exact standings without inference.
